comment: PEDAL BUILD manifest for Flower (2-knob, hardware-proven UI shape). The 6-knob manifest.json in this dir is the desktop-preview manifest; build.py reads THIS file. Reso, sweep range, and center frequency are baked into flower.c.
gid_comment: 0x08 = Delay category -> SONAME prefix ZDL_DLY_. Grouped under DLY (fewest stock effects = easy to find).
fxid_comment: 0x01C3. Verify uniqueness against installed effects before flashing.
audio_nop_comment: Set true for a UI-only smoke build (confirms it LOADS before trusting the DSP). The safe ladder is: flash audio_nop=true first; if it boots and shows up, set false and rebuild for sound.
